checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 101 ran exactly one bounded live docs slice using `.specbridge/runtime-launches/issue-097-docs.runtime-launch.json` after runtime capability and runtime preflight passed.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Runtime execution succeeded, executor evidence exists, runtime-run/result/summary artifacts validate, and the summary reports `ready_for_policy_gates` with zero blockers.

checked_dimensions.name: live_execution_boundary
checked_dimensions.evidence: Only the docs slice was launched. The issue 097 status and tests runtime launch plans remain unlaunched by this contract.

checked_dimensions.name: executor_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Executor-written files are limited to `docs/specbridge-multi-slice-live-pilot-contract.md` and `.specbridge/runtime-evidence/issue-097-docs.executor-output.md`.

checked_dimensions.name: runtime_diagnostics
checked_dimensions.evidence: The runtime execution artifact records bounded redacted diagnostics and stores stdout/stderr length, line count, and SHA-256 metadata instead of raw unbounded streams.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No secrets, production, billing, auth or authorization security, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security, deployment automation, or production deployment paths were touched.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files do not include .env files, secrets, private keys, production configuration, billing configuration, authentication security, authorization security, CI/CD security controls, dependency manifests, database paths, or deployment automation.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in `.specbridge/scopes/issue-101-bounded-live-docs-slice.scope.json`; executor-written files stayed inside the docs launch exclusive write paths.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Runtime execution, runtime-run, runtime result, runtime summary, runtime preflight, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, ChatGPT audit, security gate, review gate, standard profile, smoke, and whitespace validators passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 101 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The audit packet marks CI as not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion pending PR CI, GitHub CI as not_collected, pending pull request and merge gates, no deployment, and unlaunched status/tests slices as residual risk.

findings.evidence: Issue 101 local evidence is being prepared, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
Status and tests slices remain prepared but unlaunched.
